issues.description: Underscore-based Markdown emphasis is not normalized by the external-verification parser, so otherwise valid reviewer output like '__Verdict:__ VERIFIED', 'Verdict: __ISSUES_FOUND__', or '__Scope:__ specification' parses as no-recognizable-verdict/scope and incorrectly re-triggers the soft gate.
issues.verificationMethod: Verifier (gpt-5-4) read _strip_markdown in ai_router/external_verification.py in the session diff: '*' and backticks are removed everywhere but underscores only at line edges, so inner '__'/'_' emphasis around the Verdict:/Scope: keys or tokens breaks the regexes.
issues.suggestedTestOrCheck: Parse '__Verdict:__ VERIFIED', 'Verdict: __ISSUES_FOUND__', '_Scope:_ specification' and assert recognition, plus ISSUES_FOUND internal underscore survival.
issues.resolution_notes: _strip_markdown now removes any underscore NOT between two alphanumerics (regex _UNDERSCORE_EMPHASIS_RE), stripping emphasis while preserving ISSUES_FOUND's internal underscore. Regression test test_underscore_emphasis_variants_parse covers all three shapes.

issues.description: The WAIVED continuation was looser than the documented grammar: 'Verdict: WAIVED' followed by a BLANK line and then 'Reason: ...' was accepted, though the doc requires the reason on the same line or the immediately-following line only.
issues.verificationMethod: Verifier (gpt-5-4) compared _parse_round_body's WAIVED continuation loop (skips blank lines) against the grammar documented in cross-provider-verification.md.template ('immediately following').
issues.suggestedTestOrCheck:
Parse 'Verdict: WAIVED

Reason: x' and assert the waiver is NOT recognized.
issues.resolution_notes: The continuation now inspects strictly the next physical line (no blank-line skipping), matching the documented grammar; malformed waivers fall back to the soft-warn path. Regression test test_waived_reason_after_blank_line_is_rejected.
